facebook.caption: Sitting right on Khem Beach, one of Phu Quoc's most beautiful stretches of sand, New World Phu Quoc Resort earns its 4.7-star reputation the moment you arrive. Think lush tropical grounds, multiple pools, and direct beach access, all wrapped in the kind of polished service that makes a holiday feel genuinely effortless. For foreign visitors, this is a strong choice if you want comfort and location in one package. Practical tip: book your beach chairs and pool cabanas early in the day, especially during peak season, as they fill up fast.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the sun hit that infinity pool, the palms sway along Khem Beach, and the staff bring out fresh towels before you even ask. New World Phu Quoc Resort is that kind of place. 4.7 stars across 5,117 reviews, and honestly, the footage speaks for itself.

instagram.caption: Khem Beach. Infinity pools. 4.7 stars from over 5,000 guests. New World Phu Quoc Resort delivers the full tropical escape, with direct beach access and resort-wide polish that makes every hour feel like a holiday. Book early for peak season.
instagram.video_caption: Palm trees, pristine sand, and a pool that basically begs you to do nothing all day. New World Phu Quoc Resort on Khem Beach is giving five-star energy, and 5,117 reviews agree.

tiktok.caption: This is New World Phu Quoc Resort on Khem Beach, 4.7 stars and the vibe is immaculate. Your Phu Quoc base camp sorted. #PhuQuoc #LuxuryTravel #BeachResort #VietnamTravel
